_doc: Per-preset diffRatio ceilings for the MapLibre parity gate. The spec asserts measured diffRatio ≤ baseline × HEADROOM. Values captured 2026-05-13 after rebake — Liberty Tokyo's initial 20% reading turned out to be a tile-loading-incomplete flake (stable measurement: ~9%). Rebake on every PR that explicitly notes a regression or improvement; do not silently relax.
